extDesc.message: Privacy-first, local-only browser time tracker that captures your flow and mental energy without a single network request.

toast_question.message: You've been away for $1 minutes, what were you doing?

hero_warrior.message: On $1, starting from $2, you locked into $3h $4min of uninterrupted flow like a flow state machine! Try to recreate this next week.

hero_good.message: On $1, starting from $2, you entered $4min of uninterrupted deep flow. That deep engagement is your most valuable time asset.

experiment_switching.message: Your context switching frequency is on the high side. Next week, try locking in $1 as a no-interruption deep work block — that's when you focus best.

experiment_switching_generic.message: Your context switching frequency is on the high side. Next week, try locking in a fixed no-interruption deep work block each morning.

experiment_good_flow.message: You've developed a solid flow habit. Next week's experiment: when you feel the urge to switch tabs, push through for just 5 more minutes.

experiment_default.message: Your focus rhythm is building steadily. Keep using TimeWise and next week you'll receive a personalized micro-experiment.

no_data_hero.message: Your flow data is brewing. Spend 10+ minutes on your core work tools and check back — your first highlight appears soon!

hero_info.message: This duration is your longest unbroken flow streak — it can span several tools (e.g. docs → GitHub → localhost), so it may exceed any single site's time in the rankings below.

ranking_empty.message: No browsing data yet — start exploring!

tip_flow.message: Total focused browsing time over the last 7 days — productive and unclassified sites, excluding distractions and idle time.

tip_switch.message: Average times you switched between sites per active hour. Lower means deeper, less fragmented focus.

tip_bestday.message: The day in the last 7 days with the most focused time.

tip_goal.message: Your daily focus target. Shows today's focused hours against your goal — set your own below.

golden_tip.message: Each row is a day (last 7 days, today at the bottom); each column is an hour. Brighter cells mean more uninterrupted deep focus. Today's future hours are empty.

golden_result.message: Over the past week you focus best around $1, averaging $2 min of deep focus per day. Schedule important work here.

golden_empty.message: Building your flow profile — keep working and your peak hours will surface here.

distraction_body.message: You've spent $1 min on $2 today. Ready to get back to work?

weekly_report_body.message: $1h deep flow this week. Best day: $2. Open Dashboard →
